id.description: Stable identifier for this portable OACS record.

protected_type.description: Kind of protected value represented without exposing plaintext.

label.description: Human-readable label that does not reveal protected plaintext.

sensitivity.description: Sensitivity classification used for policy decisions.

provider.description: External vault, keychain, or secret manager provider name; plaintext is not stored here.

uri.description: External locator for the protected value; agents use capabilities rather than embedded plaintext.

namespace.description: Logical namespace used to separate records without requiring a specific storage backend.

scope.description: Portable scope labels that constrain where the record applies.

allowed_tools.description: Allowed tool names or identifiers exposed through this binding.

projection.description: Projection mode that controls what may be shown in context or tool results.

status.description: Lifecycle status for this record in the portable OACS model.
